description: This stylish pair of flip-flops from lee cooper makes a trendy statement combined with superior performance. It's a great combination of enhanced cushioning and durability. These sandals give superior traction and protection to the feet, while remaining comfortable and stylish enough for casual wear. You can team these with linen pants and shirts for a refined look.UpperLeather thong straps covering for better comfort and durabilityStitch detailing for greater reinforcement and styleTextile lining for greater comfortMidsoleFabric covered cushioned footbed with elevated bumps for all day comfortOutsoleTPR outsole for durability and higher abrasion resistanceTextured outsole with terraced grooves for better gripSlight heel for ergonomic comfortWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
